title: Crispy Norwegian Carrot Crust
description: An earthy and crispy weeknight dish featuring carrots in a bhuna sauce that's perfect for pescatarian diets and can be prepared quickly as a side or main course.

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp bhuna sauce base (ensure it's vegan-friendly)

instructions: Sauté minced garlic in a pan until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
Add carrot slices and sauté for another 5-7 minutes until slightly softened but not mushy.
If using bhuna sauce base, mix it into the sautéed vegetables. If not, proceed without adding any sauces.
Toss with paprika, lemon juice (reserve some for later), salt, and pepper to taste.
Transfer the vegetable mixture onto a greased baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve immediately. Garnish with reserved lemon wedges for extra zest.
